Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x095D "GAMEOVERII-SIDE1-095D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Game Over II (Side 1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Zeroed out an unnecessary repeated byte pattern from $10C0 - $1CC0. 2. Patched the JSR $A9E9 instruction at $A52B to be JSR $1800 instead (this is to allow the game to be started with the fire button in port 2 from the title sequence). 3. Added a small routine at $1800 which checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if 2 is pressed and start the game in joystick control mode. It then calls the subroutine at $A9E9 to carry on the normal code flow. 4. Patched the JSR $B157 instruction at $A8F0 to be JSR $1700 instead (this is to allow the game to be started with the fire button in port 2 from the main menu). 5. Added a small routine at $1700 which checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if 2 is pressed and start the game in joystick control mode. It then calls the subroutine at $B157 to carry on the normal code flow. 6. Changed $B245 from $00 to $01 to default to joystick input reading.
